title: Comin' Round the Mountain
writer: Lewis R. Foster, Maxwell Shane, Duke Atteberry
actors: Bob Burns, Una Merkel, Jerry Colonna
plot: Throckmorton P. Gildersleeve relates to a W.P.A. employment advisor the story of how he lost the mayorship of the town of Monotony and became a forgotten man: Jed Blower returned to his sixteen member hillbilly family with his bus...
